focus: Review-depth v2 coverage claims vs workflow-runner test depth

evidenceSummary.summary: Deep-review README and quality-gates catalog accurately describe the nine-gate legal-stop contract without explicitly claiming workflow-runner test execution.
The manual playbook root uses broad validate wording, while the dedicated graphless fallback scenario discloses pending workflow-runner integration/manual harness.
The actual review-depth convergence fixture checks YAML text rather than executing a full workflow-runner stop-gate path.
Deep-loop-runtime integration README and feature-catalog labels risk overstating review-depth convergence coverage by grouping the YAML fixture under end-to-end/script-entry integration wording.
